overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a lush prairie meadow filled with white wildflowers under an overcast sky. The character follows a winding dirt path past stone walls and scattered trees, heading toward a distant red barn in the rolling countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass meadow with white wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers in an open meadow

entered.detail: lush green grass covering the ground, waist-high on the character
clusters of small white flowers scattered throughout the grass
dense forest line forming the horizon boundary
rolling green hill visible in the distance under cloudy skies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a cowboy character walking through a dense meadow of tall green grass and white wildflowers. The landscape is wide open with full sky visibility under overcast conditions, and a tree line marks the distant horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path with stone walls and scattered trees

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to a compacted dirt path
red barn becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: following a winding dirt path through the prairie, passing stone walls on the right

entered.detail: low rock wall running parallel to the path on the right side
narrow brown dirt trail winding through the grass
tall leafless tree trunk standing beside the path
large red wooden barn with dark roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the meadow onto a defined dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the right. A prominent dead tree stands beside the path, and a red barn appears in the distance ahead. The ground is now bare earth rather than tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie path approaching red barn

events.description: stone wall disappears as the landscape opens into rolling prairie

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path toward the red barn, with open fields on both sides

entered.detail: expansive rolling grassland stretching to the horizon
gentle green slopes visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path continues through open prairie landscape with the red barn now centered ahead in the distance. The stone walls and dead tree have been left behind, replaced by expansive rolling fields under the overcast sky. The character maintains a steady walking pace toward the distant building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush prairie meadow that gradually transitions into an open countryside path leading toward a distant farm. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy walking through dense tall grass and white wildflowers under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from the meadow onto a defined dirt path bordered by a stone wall and a prominent dead tree, bringing a red barn into view in the distance. The scene then expands across the rolling prairie as the stone walls fade behind the character, leaving an expansive landscape of open fields. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace, centering the red barn ahead as the destination under the gray sky.
